appsync.functionconfiguration.ApiId.Docs: The AWS AppSync GraphQL API that you want to attach using this function.

appsync.functionconfiguration.DataSource.Docs: The name of data source this function will attach.

appsync.functionconfiguration.FunctionVe.Docs: The version of the request mapping template. Currently, only the 2018-05-29 version of the template is supported.

appsync.functionconfiguration.MaxBatchSi.Docs: The maximum number of resolver request inputs that will be sent to a single AWS Lambda function in a `BatchInvoke` operation.

appsync.functionconfiguration.RequestMap.Docs: The `Function` request mapping template. Functions support only the 2018-05-29 version of the request mapping template.
Describes a Sync configuration for a resolver.  Contains information on which Conflict Detection, as well as Resolution strategy, should be performed when the resolver is invoked.

appsync.functionconfiguration.ResponseMa.Docs: The location of a response mapping template in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use this if you want to provision with a template file in Amazon S3 rather than embedding it in your CloudFormation template.

appsync.functionconfiguration.SyncConfig.Docs: Describes a Sync configuration for a resolver.  Specifies which Conflict Detection strategy and Resolution strategy to use when the resolver is invoked.
